name: Capers Cauthen
title: Landrumtables.com / owner designer
body: It has been a pleasure working with Hank to bring my ideas and inspirations to Life. I highly recommend giving Hank an opportunity to create your products, whether a one off or mass production. Everything he has done for me has been done with thought and care and the results have been great. All of his creations have exceeded my expectations! Thank you, Hank.
